hypothesis.explanation: Core prediction (attention increases intimacy) matches, but operationalization and measure are incorrect: prereg specifies Zoom camera on/off and a 4-item intimacy index, not an 80% monitoring signal or 6 items.

study_type.explanation: Matches preregistered Study type: Experiment with random assignment to attention vs no attention.

data_plan.dataset_identifier.explanation: The reference document does not mention any dataset filename or identifier.

data_plan.source_type.explanation: Describes an experimental quiz task with intimacy items, which aligns with the preregistered 20-item quiz and post-quiz intimacy survey, though the prereg specifies Zoom-based rather than 'laboratory-style'.

data_plan.wave_or_subset.explanation: Consistent with a single between-subjects comparison: attention vs no attention.

data_plan.sample_size.explanation: Reference specifies a planned target N=40; the stated N=41 is not supported by the preregistration.

data_plan.unit_of_analysis.explanation: Consistent with between-subjects design at the participant level.

data_plan.access_details.explanation: The reference document does not include file paths or access instructions.

data_plan.qualification.explanation.explanation: Accurately reflects the preregistered procedures (20-item quiz, attention manipulation, intimacy ratings), but frames them as ‘dataset’ details not specified in the prereg.

data_plan.qualification.similarity_to_or.explanation: Correct about original Ohtsubo paradigm (0% vs 80% attention; 4 items on 7-point scale, reflected in the prereg’s debrief and measures), but adds dataset-specific variables not in the reference.

data_plan.qualification.deviation_from_o.explanation: Correct that original used 4 intimacy items (per prereg), but claims about using 6 items and N=41 are not supported by the preregistration.

data_plan.notes.explanation: Partially overlaps (20 trivia questions; demographics), but variable names (a1–a6, atot) and SPSS specifics are not in the reference.

planned_method.steps.explanation: Includes conceptually aligned steps (reverse-code one item, sum to intimacy, independent-samples t-test), but most details (file I/O, script execution) are not in the prereg.

planned_method.models.explanation: Matches the preregistered independent-samples t-test; additions (Welch, effect sizes, reliability) are not specified in the reference.

planned_method.outcome_variable.explanation: Prereg defines intimacy as a 4-item index with one reversed; the extracted plan uses 6 items, which does not match.

planned_method.independent_variables.explanation: Two-level attention manipulation (attention vs no attention) matches the preregistration.

planned_method.control_variables.explanation: No covariates for the focal t-test aligns with the prereg; sex only appears in an exploratory ANOVA.

planned_method.tools_software.explanation: The preregistration does not specify software or programming tools.

planned_method.planned_estimation_and_te.explanation: Difference in means and effect sizes align in spirit with the prereg’s t-test focus; effect sizes are not explicitly preregistered.
Independent-samples t-test matches; Welch variant is an added detail not in the prereg.

planned_method.missing_data_handling.explanation: Matches preregistered plan to exclude participants with missing data.

planned_method.multiple_testing_policy.explanation: Consistent with a single primary outcome and no correction specified in the preregistration.

planned_method.inference_criteria.explanation: Matches alpha=.05, two-tailed and same-direction criterion; adds an effect-size comparability criterion not in the prereg.

codebase.files.analysis_ohtsubo__py.py.explanation: No code files are described in the preregistration.

codebase.notes.explanation: No codebase details appear in the reference.

docker_specs.base_image.explanation: No environment or containerization details in the reference.

docker_specs.packages.python.explanation: No software package details in the reference.

docker_specs.packages.other.explanation: No software package details in the reference.

docker_specs.hardware.gpu_support.explanation: No hardware specifications in the reference.

docker_specs.hardware.min_gpu_memory_gb.explanation: No hardware specifications in the reference.

docker_specs.hardware.min_ram_gb.explanation: No hardware specifications in the reference.

docker_specs.volumes.explanation: No file-mounting or path details in the reference.

analysis.instructions.explanation: The reference does not include execution or analysis workflow instructions.

analysis.comparison_metrics.explanation: Direction and statistical significance are consistent with preregistered success criteria; explicit benchmarking to original t, p, and d is an added element not specified.
